title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zebronics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zebronics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zebronics! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zebronics:
Zebronics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics!
